nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, even all his wars and his acts, behold, they are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel and Judah.

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, and all his wars and his ways, behold, they are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel and Judah.

cnv.text: 約坦其餘的事蹟，他的一切戰爭和作為，都記在以色列和猶大列王記上。

ccb.text: 约坦其他的事迹、所有战事和作为都记在以色列和犹大的列王史上。
